CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2

/CAL: PAROLE PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DEF 170,6JUD: HARRY DORFMAN/MO GRTD /N LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1, #2, #3, #4 AND #5 FROMTHIS PETITION/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1 FROM SUPPLEMENTAL PETITION DATED 1-26-21/3000REIN/PAJ: 100 DAYS/X: WITH TIME LOST/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 35 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY DAPO (DEPT, OF ADULT PAROLE     OPERATIONS),/ /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW   INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/VD: 02-23-21 PAROLE REVOCATION HEARING/

/CAL: PRC EVALUATION/ /X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/X: ORAL MOTION BY DEFENSE COUNSEL FOR OR RELEASE/MO DENIED/X: 2 DATES ARE SET/X: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING ON 2-9-21 & PAROLE REVOCATION HEARING ON 2-23-31/ /CONT/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE PRC EVALUATION/X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING/DAWT//X: ADDITIONAL SUPPLEMENTAL PAROLE PETITION FILED TO ADD VIOLATION #6;   RECEIPT OF STOLEN PROPERTY/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS/X: BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET/NB/ /X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/CONT/X: PRC EVALUATION NEXT DATE,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/X: BAIL IS SET ON PAROLE ARRAIGNMENT/NB/ /X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PRC EVALUATION/
